description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and define variables CONTAINER_REF_IMAGE as ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE as ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:latest, and GIT_DEPTH='3'. Set three stages: build, test, and release. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker build -t ${CONTAINER_REF_IMAGE} ., then docker login -u ${CI_REGISTRY_USER} -p ${CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD} ${CI_REGISTRY}, and finally docker push ${CONTAINER_REF_IMAGE}, and runs on runners tagged docker. In the test stage add a test job that runs docker run --rm -t ${CONTAINER_REF_IMAGE} make check, also on docker‑tagged runners. In the release stage add a release job that only runs on the master branch, runs docker login -u ${CI_REGISTRY_USER} -p ${CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD} ${CI_REGISTRY}, docker pull ${CONTAINER_REF_IMAGE}, docker tag ${CONTAINER_REF_IMAGE} ${CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE}, and docker push ${CONTAINER_LATEST_IMAGE}, again on docker‑tagged runners.
